programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Three incidents of bank robbery have happened; a total of 1.3 billion yen was stolen. A man calling himself Goemon is the culprit and he even sends Lupin a challenge, but Goemon wants to settle the score by himself.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's stash of Napoleon's cash got stolen, but Lupin catches the culprit and tries to make him confess. Turns out he's only one of the followers of the Fandar cult, and heads to their holy land of Fandara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin learns that a treasure trove lies in a volcano on Cleo Island, but it can only be reached when the mountain isn't spewing molten lava! He tries to convince Jigen and Goemon to join him but they're not interested.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko informs Lupin that fine quality diamonds from South Africa are stored in a safe of a global syndicate and importer of diamonds. Lupin makes his way as a worker in the boiler room, and steals the loot of diamonds.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds out about the jewel "Poison Trio" of the Borges family and decides to steal it after Fujiko goads him. Galdan, the nephew of Lucricia greets Lupin, and tells him that elderly Lucricia had been arrested and must be broken out of jail.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Holocaust

programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets a musician playing a glass harmonica. Dr. Platypus practices his bagpipes with Handyman Negri on guitar and King Friday on the bass violin.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Arguably the most influential book ever written, the Bible provides a glimpse into the origins of ancient technology and its use to withstand the elements, build great structures, wage war, and conserve precious water.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A visit to the United States Mint and the Bureau of Printing and Engraving to see the secretive government facilities where the legal tender is generated; with a storied past as tantalizing as the wealth they create, these mints can spit fortunes.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The intense competition, the romance, the success and disappointment that led to the miracle of long distance communication.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A countdown of the top gizmos and gadgets featured on "Modern Marvels," from golden oldies to newfangled thingamabobs, including an electronic doodad that was once considered a threat to national security.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Episode takes a look at the items found in peoples' pockets all across America; not cell phones, which everybody has, but more intimate items, personal things, both valuable and cheap.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci remains intriguing 500 years after death; beyond great artist, he was remarkable scientist and inventor whose notebooks contained incredible machines from weapons to submarines, robots, and analogue computers with workable plans.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: DVD, CD, PDA, HDTV, PVR--used to be the ultimate in "gotta have it" gadgets and gizmos and "to die for" technology that populate a digital world of acronyms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of one of Thomas Edison's first inventions, the phonograph; rare photographs and recordings document Edison's race against Alexander Graham Bell.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The complete story of the feuds, the mistakes, ingenuity, and successes that made movies possible and kept Edison at the front of the inventor pack; rare early films from the Edison Studios.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: When cultures develop literacy, science, and language, codes emerge spontaneously; explore the rich history of secret symbolic communication from Egyptian hieroglyphics to Caesar's encryption, wartime codebreakers, and cyberspace.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Salute to tools and toys that stood the test of time from Zippo lighters to Palm Pilots; examine technology behind familiar gadgets including flashlights, transistor radios, safety razors, and metronomes that changed lives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Ink, invented by Chinese around 3000BC, spread religious and war messages while setting people free and spelling out rights; from squid to soybeans, ancient texts to tattoos, ink tells stories, sells products, and solves crimes everywhere.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Arizona Cardinals' dome stadium and its movable lawn; Scotts Company; Toro Company; sprinkler systems developed by the Rain Bird Company.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: For centuries, banks enable the creation of wealth; a chronicle of banking, from its early European origins to e-banking; modern technology revolutionizes the way banks do business.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Well over two million years before modern man evolved, his primitive ancestors were making tools; the ability to extend the hand and strengthen the arm is considered one of the keys to human evolution.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of civilization could easily be measured in terms of our ability to make, use, and improve tools; episode examines power tool industry, which is booming thanks to more powerful, lighter, and quieter cordless tools.

programme.title: ONE Event

programme.title: ONE Event

programme.title: ONE Event

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's journey with the crew looks to be coming to an end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Just when Luffy and Nami are in Big Mom's grasp, Pudding arrives, but with news that they aren't expecting - meanwhile Brook and Chopper both make headway getting out of their own jams!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hopes his wedding with Pudding will solve the Straw Hat's predicament - but Pudding secretly plans to to avoid the marriage, sharing a secret with Luffy. Meanwhile, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries desperately to free himself as the risk of his own well-being! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot continue to search the mirror universe, Brook squares off against Big Mom, and Pedro's past is revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to break himself free as Sanji falls deeper in love with the idea of marrying Pudding... But the mask falls off and the deadly charade of Big Mom is revealed as the depths of her treachery come to light!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook continues his all-out struggle against Big Mom, but his secret weapon might not be enough to save him! Meanwhile, an unexpected ally from the past comes to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei arrives on the scene and works to free Luffy and Nami! Meanwhile Sanji confronts his sister with the awful truth of Pudding, and she confides in him the powerful secret of their mother's undying love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook finds himself totally at the whim of Big Mom, and comes face to face with her brutal love! Meanwhile, Pedro reveals his explosive plan to create a distraction!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot use the mirror dimension to get in touch with Nami and Jimbei! Luffy makes it through more obstacles to learn that he just missed Sanji! Meanwhile, Sanji wonders alone about the best course of action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding in front of him! Meanwhile, Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under control, but doubt besets Montd'Or.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others finally find Brook in the mirror dimension - but he's in the most inopportune of places! Can they challenge the sleeping Mama and rescue their friend? Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Luffy meet finally - and while he is happy to feed Luffy to replenish his energy, Sanji's explanation of what actions he must take baffles Luffy! The crucial decision, to turn his back on his friends or his family, tears Sanji apart!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The newly reunited Luffy and Sanji hear from the rest of the Straw Hats in the mirror dimension! Then, Jimbei starts telling them about Capone "Gang" Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats put Jimbei's plan into action and approach Bege with the possibility of an alliance. But before they are granted an audience, they must make themselves presentable!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The proposed alliance between the Straw Hats and Bege unfolds! A gaseous blast from the past, Gastino, a member of Bege's team, reveals the secret weapon that the team plans to use against the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now, the assassination plan of Big Mom is all set and everyone starts preparing for the Tea Party. Montd'Or finds one of his crewmates, Bobbin the Disposer, dead, and suspects Sanji and Luffy of the crime.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Final preparations abound on all sides and multiple plots start to come together! But can Sanji keep his nerve and go through with the plan? Or will Pudding's beauty prove too enchanting?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All plans go into action as the moment of the wedding arrives - but as the veil is lifted on Pudding's grotesque face, all hell breaks loose and unexpected circumstances mean chaos at the altar! Meanwhile, Luffy charges in, adding to the mayhem!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is launched! Big Mom falls to pieces as the wedding - and the wedding cake - are destroyed and a slew of Luffys are wreaking havoc around the site. But just when Luffy gets in trouble, Jimbei confronts Big Mom bravely!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is in full swing however - Big Mom is pushed past the edge of sanity and can't even bring herself to act. Meanwhile, her children make a move against Germa and Pudding takes up her original aim of killing Sanji!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan discovers that Beka's boyfriend was really Drago Musevini, and he used Beka's DNA to create the Nietzscheans. She is their Alpha Matriarch.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Rhade find a test that will either grant them great wealth or drive them to madness.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper discovers a program built into the Seefra system that can destroy eight of the planets, likely as a defense mechanism. Trance tries to stop this.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: While Harper works on a way to save the Seefra system, a spy sneaks aboard Andromeda and attacks Beka.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An attempt is made to fix the blinking sun of Seefra, but Trance is replaced by a doppelganger.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When Dylan is badly injured in a lab explosion, he travels through a series of alternate realities.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie is rebuilt to help evacuate the Seefra system.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A warlord convinces his followers that the approaching destruction of the outer planets is a plot to make it easier to loot their planet.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade, and Beka work together to rescue Trance from Methus-2 and Harper from General Burma.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew finally makes it out of the Seefra system, and discover Dylan is the last Paradine; the World Ship wasn't destroyed, and Nietzscheans have begun their plan to destroy Earth.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: In the series finale, the final battle to save the New Systems Commonwealth begins.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police Captain William Boone is caught between two worlds when he is recruited by the Taelons, also known as the "Companions," to become Commander of Security and Interspecies Relations and then secretly drafted to join the human resistance movement.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Commander William Boone tracks his wife's murderer, determined to find out if the American Companion Da'an or the underground resistance ordered her execution.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A young woman becomes a pawn in power play between the Companions and a charismatic religious leader when her hands are regenerated by Taelon technology.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe that a serial killer is using classified ads to lure and murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer crisscrosses the Midwest leaving a string of victims along the interstate, but when he realizes investigators are hot on his trail the murderer suddenly changes his mark.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer conceals his victims' bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleyways of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A Houston killer taunts the media and authorities as he uses homemade ligatures to murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer who is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chaos descends on Phoenix as two serial killers compete for the media's attention and the bodies pile up faster than the police can investigate.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Investigators in East Baton Rouge, La., hunt for a serial murderer who carefully carves up and cuts the bodies of his victims after death.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When multiple victims' bodies are dumped around Louisiana's bayou area, a task force is formed to catch a killer who police believe may have strangled over 20 men.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In 1990, a serial killer terrorizes the University of Florida's campus, killing five students in under four days; the Gainesville Ripper leaves behind a crime scene where all the victims have been stabbed but the females have been posed like dolls.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans; the "Last Call Killer" hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns; a survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles; he tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun
programme.desc: After his life is threatened, Roger Moore as 007 is lured into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with a million-dollar killer (Christopher Lee). Britt Ekland and Maud Adams co-star.

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me
programme.desc: Roger Moore as agent 007 teams with a beautiful Soviet agent (Barbara Bach) to battle Stromberg (Curt Jurgens) in order to save the world from total annihilation and a 315-pound villain, "Jaws" (Richard Kiel).

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Roger Moore, in his fourth role as Agent 007, is sent to outer space to protect Britain and the world from a madman who would destroy the earth in this pulse-pounding, out-of-this-universe adventure.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: Roger Moore as the formidable James Bond takes on the dangerous task of locating a top secret device that lies precariously in the waters off the beautiful Greek coast in this breathtaking action thriller.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: 007: Thunderball (ESP)
programme.desc: Las emociones no se detienen cuando James Bond se sumerge en esta implacable aventura llena de explosivas confrontaciones e increíbles secuencias de acción submarina.

programme.title: 007: Solo se vive dos veces
programme.desc: Un desastre en el espacio lleva a la humanidad hacia la Tercera Guerra Mundial y sólo James Bond puede prevenirlo en esta magnífica, intempestiva y espectacular película.

programme.title: 007: Los diamantes son eternos
programme.desc: Una fortuna de diamantes robados pone a James Bond en acción nuevamente. En esta emocionante aventura, Sean Connery regresa como el Agente 007 y hace equipo con la bella Tiffany Case.

programme.title: 007: Casino Royale (ESP)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) enfrenta un desafío mortal: evitar que Le Chiffre, un peligroso banquero, gane un juego de póker multimillonario y utilice sus ganancias para financiar el terrorismo global.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: 007: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Rush Hour

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: While vacationing together in Hong Kong, fast-talking LAPD Detective Carter and Hong Kong Police Inspector Lee investigate when a bomb explodes in the American embassy.

programme.title: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: Set in Paris, Rush Hour 3 finds Chris Tucker and Jackie Chan's misfit partners from West and East battling a wing of the Chinese organized crime family of the Triads -- with their trademark mix of great action and big laughs.

programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Solar System: The Secrets of the Universe
programme.desc: Join our host on the International Space Station of the year 2050. Marvel at the three-dimensional sights and learn many things about the astral bodies that surround us.

programme.title: Science of the Soul
programme.desc: Do human beings have souls? From the beginning of human awareness – no matter the context and no matter the age – the answer was always \"yes\". All cultures have universally argued that human beings are \"ensouled\".

programme.title: Einstein's Universe
programme.desc: A fascinating exploration of Einstein's theory of relativity told by narrator actor Peter Ustinov, and a cadre of preeminent scientists. Produced on the centennial of Einstein’s birth in 1979 by WGBH and BBC, based on Nigel Calder’s titular book.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night... until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Rookie cops Jonah Hill and Channing Tatum go undercover as students to bust a high school drug ring - with hysterically disastrous results!

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: When a power-crazed despot schemes to buy California from Mexico, it takes two Zorros--the legendary Don Diego de la Vega and his chosen successor Alejandro Murrieta, a dashing bandit-turned-hero-- to defeat the tyrant's unscrupulous plans.

programme.title: Rent
programme.desc: Based on Jonathan Larson's Bohemian rock musical, Rent tells the story of a group of social outcasts struggling to live in the moment yet survive the realities of New York's gritty East Village.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls At Parties
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Enn, a shy teenager in 70s London, meets the beautiful and rebellious Zan (Elle Fanning) at a party. They set in motion the ultimate showdown between their rivaling worlds and test the limits of how far they will go for true love.

programme.title: 20th Century Women
programme.desc: A strong-willed single mother (Annette Bening) raises her teenage son with the help of two unconventional younger women (Elle Fanning, Greta Gerwig) in this look at a makeshift family's comic adventures in Santa Barbara during the summer of 1979.

programme.title: The Vanishing of Sidney Hall
programme.desc: An enigmatic detective (Kyle Chandler) goes on a cross-country search for a once-prominent author (Logan Lerman), who has mysteriously disappeared after a string of dangerous arsons have targeted his celebrated, controversial first novel.

programme.title: Ginger & Rosa
programme.desc: In 1962 London, the lifelong friendship between two teenagers (Elle Fanning, Alice Englert) dissolves after one seduces the other's father.

programme.title: Drugstore June
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Hannibal Rising
programme.desc: Young Hannibal moves in with his aunt and begins plotting revenge after his baby sister is killed during World War II. Based on Thomas Harris' novel.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls (2006)
programme.desc: To Jill Johnson, it was the perfect babysitting job. The parents were away. The fridge was stocked. The children were tucked into bed. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: Owen, an overlooked and bullied boy, finds love and revenge through Abby (Chloë Grace Moretz of KICK-ASS), a beautiful but peculiar girl who turns out to be a vampire.

programme.title: Succubus
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: Hell House LLC.
programme.desc: Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Prey for the Devil
programme.desc: With cases of demonic possession at an all-time high, the first female exorcist is called to save the soul of a young girl. But who, or what, has invited her?

programme.title: Sorority Row
programme.desc:
They're sisters to the bloody end! After a prank goes fatally wrong, party-hearty sorority girls hide the corpse. Months later, a mysterious killer won't let the past stay buried.
Rated R

programme.desc: A young, blind operator for a suicide hotline descends into a night of unrelenting terror when an obsessive caller turns out to be a serial killer.

programme.desc: When U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels arrives at the asylum for the criminally insane on Shutter Island, he uncovers terrifying truths about the island and finds out some places never let you go.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an organization wants to give a crew member an award, Captain Stubing suggests Isaac. Meanwhile, a fun-loving guy tries to help out his heartbroken friend but finds himself in trouble after meeting an unusual woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The professional escort of an older woman (Vera Miles) dallies with a young woman (Constance Forslund); an advertising whiz tries to impress his best client despite putdowns from her daughter.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An estranged mother and daughter mend their relationship after a secret about their past is revealed. Then, an attractive widow finds herself falling for a burly crew member.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An author (Tom Poston) is blackmailed by his secretary; a father and son (Geoffrey Scott, Clark Brandon) unwittingly fall for the same woman (Markie Post).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An Army captain (Beth Howland) sets her sights on Gopher; a married couple (Charlotte Rae, Louis Nye) meet up with two swingers (Jamie Farr, Heather Locklear).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a passenger goes missing about the Pacific Princess. Meanwhile, when Julie's high-school friend boards the ship with her son, they learn an important lesson after running into the woman's father and another passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A carnival entrepreneur is approached on the Pacific Princess by a woman who knows a shocking secret about his past. Meanwhile, a comedy duo with a bear act competes for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: On a Hong Kong cruise: a senator romances a woman until he learns the nature of her visit; two brothers date Julie and Vicki; a compulsive shopper is offered $25,000 by her husband (Herb Edelman) if she'll resist temptation during the trip.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An international fugitive finds love when he meets a beautiful woman with a secret, while a divorcee meets an intriguing man who conceals his identity from her and Isaac.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Mac Foster
programme.desc: On April 1st, 1972 Muhammad Ali and Mac Foster fought in a fifteen round bout that ended in a unanimous decision win for Ali.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1
programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Abner Lopez
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2018 Alex Saucedo faced Abner Lopez for the WBO and NABO Super lightweight title at the StubHub Center in Carson.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Johnny Tapia vs Danny Romero
programme.desc: On July 18th, 1997, Johnny Tapia fought Danny Romero for the IBF & WBO Super Flyweight Titles at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a highly anticipated fight and an incredible battle, Tapia came out on top with a close unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Jorge Arce vs Hussein Hussein
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Jorge Arce fought Hussein Hussein in a WBC Flyweight Title Eliminator at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In an action-packed fight, the victorious Jorge Arce scored the knockdown in the 10th round that stopped the fight.

programme.title: Jorge Arce vs Wilfredo Vazquez Jr.
programme.desc: On May 7th, 2011, Jorge Arce fought Wilfredo Vazquez Jr for the WBO Super Bantamweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a very close fight that might have been a draw, Vazquez Jr's corner controversially threw in the towel in the final round.

programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin, and Godwin.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap finally learns how to Transform, only to discover his Robot Mode has no weapons. With nowhere else to turn for protection, he strikes a deal with Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a junkyard facility where the robot shells of the missing Transformers are stored. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia is utterly convinced that Thrust's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Cheetor leads a dangerous mission to try to bring out Tankor's old Maximal personality. In doing so, Rattrap discovers a major clue to the Maximal's missing memories and discovers that Tankor has Rhinox's spark. Jetstorm removes Blackarachnia's spark.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Tankor uncovers an ancient weapon with the power to turn organic material into cybernetic metal. Nightscream gets hit by the weapon and the Maximals race against time to save him from going off-line.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap uncovers a catalyst program that speeds up the growth of Cybertron's newfound plant life. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia discovers that Thrust's spark is actually Waspinator's and that Jetstorm's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Megatron prepares a doomsday weapon that can wipe out everything organic on Cybertron – including the Maximals. Meanwhile, Optimus discovers his own doomsday weapon...

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.desc: Megatron unleashes a new set of generals – who are not exactly as they appear!

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: General Ortega hires Paladin to recover $16 million in French bonds. Where they are and who has them is already known.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is lured to Oregon under the pretense of a widow in distress. The real reason is to engage him in a deadly hunt with a bored prince.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin rides upon Buddy Webster's mining camp, who needs a big favor. He has been prospecting for gold dust the last five years.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Samuel Keel hires Paladin to find Seth Carter. Keel gives him the names of three people who can help him find Seth. As Paladin finds them, each is murdered. Paladin is determined to find out why.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: After a 4 state murder spree, the Wilder Brothers head back to Texas for trial, under Paladin's gun.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After an outlaw escapes from a stagecoach killing, Editor Claibourne spearheads a drive in Tombstone to raise a $5,000 reward for his capture, but this may cause problems for Sheriff Hollister who must also now deal with greedy bounty hunters.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Cattleman Sam Brewster's men stop in Tombstone overnight while driving a herd through Arizona. Brewster's son starts blowing off steam, and Sheriff Hollister's deputy is forced to shoot him. Enraged, Brewster threatens to avenge his son's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After killing a man in self-defense in the town of Galeno, Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) finds himself hauled before a kangaroo court for trial on a murder charge, the penalty of which is death. An unexpected ally comes to Hollister's defense.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Raoul de Moreney -- a slick card shark and fortune hunter -- comes to Tombstone in search of quick riches. His vicious greed nettles the editor of the Epitaph and, in a flush of anger, the two men agree to a duel…but de Moreney is a deadly duelist.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: While the survivors of an Indian attack dig the victim's grave, they discover a vein of silver. The strike ignites a wrathful dispute between the two prospectors and the dead man's kinfolk over shares of ownership of the new-found fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is taken prisoner by a trio of fugitives who need him as a guide on their escape route to Mexico. Left with his guns but no bullets, the sheriff searches desperately for a means of escape and must make a last-ditch gamble for survival.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson is on the scene when horse thieves Cat and Jesse Crail try to trigger a war between two Indian tribes. Purpose of the Crail maneuver: They plan to steal the Indians' horses while the braves are at each others' throats.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Army Civilian Scout Bat Masterson (Gene Barry) nearly gets his neck stretched in an affair involving Colorado politics when he finds he needs to extricate himself from a capitol charge arising from a Major's ravenous political ambitions.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Bat arrives in Lordsbury to meet a friend, he changes his mind, making a 'different appointment,' instead. Three power-hungry ranchers and Lordsbury's top lawman have ganged up on Bat's friend and killed him.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The cry of 'Silver!' is heard again in Monument City, a ghost mining camp once the scene of a historic silver strike. Prospector Bat Masterson, who has an old claim, returns to Monument City to find he's road-blocked by Clay Adams and Harvey Mason.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson becomes a 'Pinkerton.' The famous detective agency baffled in their attempts to expose crime chieftain John Kelso enlists Bat to find evidence that will put Kelso behind bars permanently.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson nearly gets one tombstone more than he bargained for while en route to Tombstone, Arizona. Bat, bushwhacked by gunmen and left for dead, is found by Marshal Sam Phelps.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson takes on the job of guard and bouncer in El Paso's famed Royal Flush Saloon. The most frequent invaders of the Royal Flush are bandit raiders. Dodge City's famed Wyatt Earp makes himself handy in the ensuing fracas.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: It's a showdown at Jackson Hole when Bat Masterson ferrets out the men who murdered one of his friends. Dirty politics 'pork barrel' and two attempts on Bat's life make this a highly colorful episode in the life of the great Bat Masterson.
